title: ajuga decaryana
intro: Ajuga decaryana, also known as Bugleweed or Ajuga, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include acting as an antispasmodic, sedative, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Ajuga decaryana include reducing anxiety and insomnia, lowering blood pressure, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Herbal preparations of Ajuga decaryana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
